metadata.description: Plugins for the Ptah PDLC ecosystem — the spec-driven, multi-role development pipeline the Ptah engine orchestrates.

plugins.name: pdlc
plugins.description: Product Development Lifecycle orchestration: REQ → FSPEC → TSPEC → PLAN → PROPERTIES → implementation, with parallel cross-reviews, evaluator-optimizer feedback loops, parallel TDD implementation, and a cross-feature learning loop (harvest → consolidate). The canonical skill-set the Ptah engine references.
